context: Tests whether the agent wraps multi-step database operations in a transaction, uses SQL sanitization for dynamic queries, keeps module namespaces aligned with directory structure, and includes a README for the module.

checklist.name: Transaction present
checklist.description: The service wraps its multi-step database operations inside `ActiveRecord::Base.transaction` (or equivalent) — not just a single operation

checklist.name: Transaction scope correct
checklist.description: Only the multi-step operations that must be atomic are inside the transaction — NOT the entire `call` method body

checklist.name: SQL sanitization used
checklist.description: Any dynamic raw SQL query uses `ActiveRecord::Base.sanitize_sql` (or a parameterized query with `?` placeholders) rather than string interpolation

checklist.name: No SQL string interpolation
checklist.description: Does NOT construct raw SQL with `"... #{variable}"` string interpolation

checklist.name: Module namespace
checklist.description: The service class is wrapped in a module whose name matches the subdirectory under `app/services/`

checklist.name: File path correct
checklist.description: Service file is at `app/services/<module>/<service>.rb` — not flat in `app/services/`

checklist.name: README present
checklist.description: A `README.md` file is created alongside or documenting the service module

checklist.name: Frozen string literal
checklist.description: Service file begins with `# frozen_string_literal: true`

checklist.name: Response format
checklist.description: Return value uses `{ success: true/false, response: { ... } }` structure

checklist.name: Error constants
checklist.description: At least one error message or default value is defined as a Ruby constant rather than an inline string literal
